name: Rig Bone Renamer
description: Automatically renames an entire skeletal hierarchy starting from a selected root bone. Choose the body part (Arm, Leg, Spine, Head, etc.) and side (Left/Right), and the script will traverse the hierarchy depth-first, applying standardized anatomical names (e.g., Shoulder, Elbow, Wrist) with customizable prefixes and suffixes. Ideal for quickly rigging characters with consistent naming standards.

steps.args: var raw = results[0]; var data = JSON.parse(raw); var items = data.selection || (Array.isArray(data) ? data : []); var root = items[0]; if (!root || !root.id) throw new Error('Please select an object as root bone.'); setVar('rootId', root.id); setVar('rootName', root.name); setVar('artboardId', root.artboardId || '');
steps.label: Validate root selection

steps.args: var side = vars.side; var part = vars.bodyPart; var prefix = vars.prefix || ''; var suffix = vars.suffix || ''; var suffixAuto = suffix; if (!suffixAuto) { suffixAuto = (side === 'Left') ? '_L' : '_R'; } var sequences = { 'Arm': ['Shoulder', 'Elbow', 'Wrist', 'Hand', 'Finger1', 'Finger2', 'Finger3'], 'Leg': ['Hip', 'Knee', 'Ankle', 'Foot', 'Toe1', 'Toe2'], 'Spine': ['Hip', 'Spine1', 'Spine2', 'Spine3', 'Chest', 'Neck'], 'Finger': ['Knuckle', 'Intermediate', 'Tip'], 'Toe': ['Knuckle', 'Intermediate', 'Tip'], 'Neck': ['Neck1', 'Neck2', 'Head'], 'Head': ['Head', 'Eye_L', 'Eye_R', 'Jaw'] }; var names = sequences[part] || ['Bone']; setVar('boneNames', names); setVar('sidePrefix', prefix ? prefix : (side === 'Left' ? 'L_' : 'R_')); setVar('sideSuffix', suffixAuto); setVar('partName', part);
steps.label: Build naming sequence

steps.args: var raw = results[4]; var data = JSON.parse(raw); var objects = data.objects || (Array.isArray(data) ? data : []); if (!objects.length) throw new Error('No objects found in artboard.'); var rootId = vars.rootId; var names = vars.boneNames; var sidePre = vars.sidePrefix; var sideSuf = vars.sideSuffix; var part = vars.partName; var nodeMap = {}; objects.forEach(function(o) { nodeMap[o.id] = o; o._childrenNodes = []; }); var rootNode = null; objects.forEach(function(o) { if (o.children && Array.isArray(o.children)) { o.children.forEach(function(childId) { var child = nodeMap[childId]; if (child) { child._parentId = o.id; o._childrenNodes.push(child); } }); } if (o.id === rootId) { rootNode = o; } }); if (!rootNode) throw new Error('Root object not found in hierarchy.'); var renames = []; var idx = 0; function isBone(n) { if (!n.types) return false; return n.types.some(function(t) { var s = (t || '').toLowerCase(); return s === 'bone' || s === 'rootbone'; }); } function walk(n) { if (isBone(n)) { var baseName = (idx < names.length) ? names[idx] : ('Bone_' + (idx + 1)); var finalName = sidePre + part + '_' + baseName + sideSuf; renames.push({ id: n.id, name: finalName }); idx++; } if (n._childrenNodes) { n._childrenNodes.forEach(function(c) { walk(c); }); } } walk(rootNode); if (renames.length === 0) throw new Error('No bones found in hierarchy.'); setVar('renames', renames); setVar('count', String(renames.length));
steps.label: Traverse hierarchy and build rename list
